> 
> I see. I think we don't need the original filenames, do we? If the error is reported with `--continue-compilation`, then it should report without this flag also, right? If it failed, the failure mode is elsewhere in the code base that handles the `--continue-compilation` flag, the failure mode is not at the error generation site in AST->ASR.
> 
> So I think we can consolidate all our error tests into just a few files. And remove such comments.
> 
> CC @Pranavchiku, what do you think?

Yes @certik, Agreed.","reactions":{"url":"https://api.github.com/repos/lfortran/lfortran/issues/comments/2475627937/reactions","total_count":0,"+1":0,"-1":0,"laugh":0,"hooray":0,"confused":0,"heart":0,"rocket":0,"eyes":0},"performed_via_github_app":null}}
